items.headline: Grocery Outlet Night This Saturday at Evergreen — April 25
items.snippet: Round 2 of the 40th Anniversary tour runs Saturday at Evergreen Speedway in Monroe — the half-mile paved oval. Cheth brings the #23 in as points leader after his Apple Cup win. Hot laps in the afternoon, green flag at night. Hoosier take-offs only — ST1 left, ST2/ST3 right, procured by VMRA.

items.headline: Kahl Cheth Wins the 57th Apple Cup at Tri-City to Open the 40th Anniversary Season
items.snippet: The 57th running of the Apple Cup opened VMRA's 40th Anniversary tour at Tri-City Raceway. Kahl Cheth #23 took the main event by the full 25-point margin, with Jason Quatsoe #8 second and Steve Woods #22 third. Defending champion Kyten Jones #30 did not unload on the night — the 2026 title race opens with a new name on top of the board.

items.headline: Full 11-Date Tour Schedule Posted — 9 Points Rounds + 2 Specials
items.snippet: Apple Cup opener (done), Grocery Outlet Night at Evergreen, Apple Blossom Rubber Down at Wenatchee, CARS Tour Mark Galloway Shootout, the Ron Rohde Memorial at Stateline (non-points), the 40th Anniversary Bash at South Sound, two more Evergreen rounds, Thunder in the Valley at Wenatchee, NASCAR Championship Night, and the Fall Classic season finale.

items.headline: 40th Anniversary Patch & Banner Available at the Gate
items.snippet: Limited-run commemorative gear for sale by the tire trailer at every 2026 event. Cash or Venmo to the board.

items.headline: 2026 Tech Inspection Revisions Posted
items.snippet: Minor updates to the 2026 rulebook — tire stamping procedure and weight enforcement. Download the PDF before your next race.

items.headline: Pomp's Tire Extends Title Partnership Through 2026 Season
items.snippet: The Kent-based tire supplier renews its commitment to the club's 40th season. Read why Pomp's keeps backing vintage racing in the Pacific Northwest.
